message:
chore(runtime): normalize control-flow formatting across daemon, monitor, and dashboard paths

Apply consistency cleanups across active runtime modules to keep style aligned and reduce noise for subsequent feature work.

Scope of this commit:

- Reformat chained if-let guard expressions in ballast release, dashboard input/render loops, service binary resolution, and self-monitor timing checks for clearer branch boundaries.

- Reflow long expressions in EWMA and PID math blocks to improve readability of alpha/urgency calculations without changing numeric behavior.

- Rewrap thread liveness checks in daemon loop health monitoring for clearer scanner/executor failure handling paths.

- Keep stress test imports consistent with the current policy module usage.

Behavioral intent is unchanged; this commit is a readability and maintenance pass over currently modified runtime surfaces.
